resources.string: Hello! I\'m your UniMind assistant. How can I help you today?

Of course! Based on your goals and schedule, here's what I recommend:

1. Morning: 30-min yoga session
2. Work: Focus on high-priority tasks
3. Afternoon: Healthy lunch prep
4. Evening: Review finances

Would you like me to set reminders?
Can you help me plan my day?
Select the personality that best fits how you want to interact
AI-powered insights available to be on
Next week: Reduce dining out to 3 times per week
Next week: Increase cardio by 10 minutes daily
Next week: Maintain current bedtime of 10 PM
Task completion rate at all-time high
Next week: Focus on deep work sessions in the morning
Based on your performance, increase your weekly step goal to 70,000 steps
Reallocate ₹150 from entertainment to savings category
Group similar tasks together to improve efficiency by 20%
Maintain current bedtime of 10:30 PM for optimal recovery
Ask questions, get recommendations, and receive personalized insights across all domains
Select the areas where you want AI assistance (select multiple)
Great job! You\'re saving 37% of your income. Keep up the excellent financial habits!
Enter your email to receive a one-time OTP code. Then verify it to create a new password.
What do you want to achieve? Add your goals below
Add 10 minutes to your cardio sessions for better endurance
Try going to bed 30 minutes earlier for better recovery
Increase water intake to 2.5L per day
Complete 6 workouts (1 more than this week)
Schedule deep work tasks between 8-11 AM for peak performance
Consider declining low-priority meetings to gain 3-4 hours weekly
Group email responses and admin tasks to save time
Cut dining out to 3x per week to save ₹400/month
Add ₹200 monthly to reach 6-month expense goal
Continue current bedtime routine for optimal wellbeing
Limit evening screen use to improve sleep quality
Schedule 1-2 more social activities per week
Reduce screen time to under 5 hours
Great job! You\'ve exercised 4 days this week
Learn how UniMind helps you in Health, Productivity, Finance & Lifestyle
Our AI learns from your patterns…
Yes, all data is encrypted end-to-end…
Discover how UniMind helps you in every aspect of life.

UniMind combines artificial intelligence with your key life domains to provide personalized recommendations, track your progress, and help you achieve your goals across health, productivity, finance, and lifestyle.
AI-powered fitness tracking and personalized health recommendations
Example: \"Create my exercise plan with 30 min cardio, strength training, and yoga sessions tailored to me.\"
Example: \"Track my daily steps, weight, BMR, sleep changes, and workout schedule with daily updates.\"
Example: \"Take a 30-minute walk after dinner\" or \"Drink water every 2 hours\" after workouts.
Example: \"You\'ve been active for 3 hours. Take a 5-minute stretch break.\"
1. Set your fitness goals (weight loss, muscle gain, general fitness)
2. AI creates personalized workout plans and nutrition support
3. Track daily activities, exercises and measurements
4. Receive smart insights and habit recommendations
5. View progress reports and adjust goals as needed
Intelligent task management and time optimization
Holistic wellness and daily routine improvement
Example: \"Prioritize my tasks by deadline and importance for today.\"
Example: \"Schedule 2-hour deep work blocks with no notifications.\"
Example: \"Suggest which meetings can be async or shortened.\"
Example: \"Summarize what I completed and plan tomorrow\'s top 3 tasks.\"
1. Set your productivity goals and working hours
2. AI suggests task batching and focus sessions
3. Track tasks, meetings, and deep work time
4. Get insights on time usage and distractions
5. Adjust schedule and goals based on reports
Example: \"Create a monthly budget with 20% savings and track spending.\"
Example: \"Categorize my last 30 days of expenses and show trends.\"
Example: \"Set a goal to save $5000 for emergency fund by December.\"
Example: \"Alert me when I exceed 80% of my dining budget.\"
1. Enter your income and budget categories
2. AI suggests a balanced budget and savings target
3. Log expenses and link accounts if desired
4. Get insights on spending and recommendations
5. Track progress toward savings and goals
Example: \"Track my sleep hours and suggest a wind-down routine.\"
Example: \"Remind me to log mood and stress level twice daily.\"
Example: \"Suggest breaks and offline time based on my calendar.\"
Example: \"Help me build a morning routine: meditation, exercise, breakfast.\"
1. Set your lifestyle goals (sleep, stress, balance)
2. AI creates daily habits and routine suggestions
3. Track sleep, mood, and activity patterns
4. Receive tips to improve wellness and balance
5. Review lifestyle score and adjust goals
Explore each domain and let AI help you achieve your goals!
Adjust how UniMind learns and interacts with you
AI suggests actions without being asked
AI adapts based on your behavior patterns
Note: Changes to AI behavior may take 2-3 days to fully reflect in your experience.
All data is encrypted end-to-end and never shared with third parties
View and manage your stored data
Include at least one special character
Add extra security to your account
• Use a unique password you don\'t use elsewhere
• Enable two-factor authentication for extra security
• Never share your password with anyone
Based on data quality and consistency.
You\'re on track with your savings goal this month
Productivity streak: 5 days in a row
You\'re most productive on Wednesday mornings
Exercise consistency improves sleep quality by 35%
Saving rate increases when tracking expenses daily
• Reach emergency fund goal by Oct 2026
• Add 2 more workout sessions per week
• Review budget weekly instead of monthly
Personalized insights across your goals, health, finance, and productivity
By continuing, you agree to our
Choose how you\'d like to continue
All tasks for today are done. Great job!
Your sleep and stress log has been saved.
You reached your daily step goal: %1$d / %2$d steps. Great job!
Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties. You can revoke permissions anytime in Settings.
Enable features to get the most personalized experience.
This helps us personalize your experience.
AI Tip: You\'re 68% to your savings goal. Try reducing dining out expenses to get there faster!
You\'re on track to reach your emergency fund goal 2 months early
Sign in to continue to your account
Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
Enter your details to create your account
AI Tip: Take a 10-minute walk after lunch to reach your daily goal!
Receive proactive recommendations based on your behavior, goals, and preferences
AI Tip: Great progress! Schedule your high-priority tasks in the morning for better focus.
Monitor your goals, habits, and achievements with detailed analytics and reports
Already have an account? Sign In
One unified platform for health, productivity, finance, and lifestyle management
